message:
Fix incremental export to use finished_at instead of started_at

The incremental sync queries for runs and the companion
collect_exported_run_ids function were filtering and ordering by
started_at. This is incorrect for incremental export because a run
that started before the last sync timestamp but finished after it
would be silently skipped -- its started_at predates the watermark
even though it was not included in the previous export.

Change all four SQL queries (the two in export_table_runs_incremental
and the two in collect_exported_run_ids) to filter with
WHERE finished_at > ?1 and ORDER BY finished_at ASC. Also rename
max_started_at to max_finished_at and update its SQL to compute
MAX(finished_at) so the watermark saved for the next incremental
sync correctly reflects the latest completion time rather than
the latest start time. This ensures no completed run is missed
across successive incremental exports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
